prompt:
Use the uploaded reference image as the identity source. Create a premium streetwear campaign poster designed to stop people mid-scroll. Show the same person leaning confidently against a giant oversized beige sneaker nearly the same height as the model. Rich glossy red seamless studio background and reflective red floor. Minimal but dramatic composition with luxury editorial lighting, sharp shadows, polished reflections, cinematic depth, realistic textures.

The person wears a monochrome beige tracksuit with matching chunky sneakers, relaxed confident pose, hands in pockets. The giant sneaker is sculptural, futuristic, detailed sole patterns, premium suede and leather textures.

Add bold oversized headline typography at the top in clean modern sans serif font: “BIGGER MOVES”. Large white text dominating the frame. Add secondary copy on left: “STAND TALL. BREAK THE SCALE.” Add right side text: “NOT FOR EVERYONE. MADE FOR YOU.” Add bottom center brand text: “HARBORIS” with tagline below: “OWN YOUR EDGE”.

Add small left bottom watermark: black Instagram logo, black X logo, harboris.

High-end fashion advertising aesthetic, luxury sneaker campaign, sharp focus, ultra realistic, scroll-stopping social media poster, premium branding, balanced layout.
